availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - Accept text, subject to Freddie's corrections, and the following: lin2-3: I concur with James, and would implement his comments as follows <:ϫⲉ=PN J.Cowey (autopsy)|ed|:> 3. <:=PN J.Cowey (autopsy)|ed|ϫⲉ:> <:<:ⲁⲓⲃⲱⲕ (?)|ⲁⲛⲃⲱⲕ (?)||reg||ⲁ̄ⲃⲱⲕ:>=PN J.Cowey (autopsy)|ed|ⲁⲛ̣ⲃⲱⲕ:> ; lin10-11: ⲧ<:ἀγάπη=grc|reg|ⲁⲅⲁ:> 11. [.?]ⲩ ==> ⲧ<:ἀγάπη=grc|reg|ⲁⲅⲁ 11.- [ⲡⲏ]:> [.?]ⲩ ; lin11: Agree that the line is difficult, but I don't think we should make any changes from the ed. princ. here (instead best to leave that for a later correction, if applicable) ; lin12: [.?] <:[ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ]=PN T. Laver|ed|[.?]:> ϩⲛ̄ add space ; lin13: ⲙⲡ<:ⲗⲁϣⲁⲛⲉ|reg|ⲗϣⲁⲛⲉ:>

Vote - AcceptText - Commentary: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. lin2=> 2. ⲉϥⲥϩⲁ ⲓ(¨) (delete lacuna); ⲥⲁⲙⲟⲩⲏⲗ 3. ϫⲉ ⲁⲛ̣ⲃⲱⲕ (move ϫⲉ to next line) lin3=> <:ⲉϩⲟⲩⲛ ⲉⲡⲙⲁ|reg|ⲉϩⲟⲛ ⲩⲡⲉⲙⲁ:>; ⲙ̄ⲡⲛⲁ4.- ϭ ⲛ̄ⲣⲱⲙⲉ (add space) lin5=> ϩⲁ ⲙⲁ (add space) lin6=> <:ⲙⲛ̄ⲧⲁⲓ ϩⲱⲃ ⲛⲙⲙⲁⲕ|reg|ⲙ̄ⲙ̄7.- ⲧ ⲓ(¨)ϩⲱⲃ ⲛⲛⲏⲙⲁⲕ:>

Submit - Entered the text from the edition. Please check Greek loanwords, particularly ἀγάπη. Did my best to add diacritics from the image. It seems quite clear to me that ϫⲉ is at the end of lin2 not the beginning of lin3. Please check. ⲁⲛⲃⲱⲕ is perhaps ⲁⲃⲱⲕ with a supraline above the ⲁ? In lin11 (first of the "verso") ⲅⲓⲁ with diaeresis on the iota, but the iota seems to have been corrected, smudged. Check carefully.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.

div.ab:
ⲁⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲁⲩⲗⲟⲥ
ⲉϥⲥϩⲁⲓ ⲛⲡⲗⲁϣⲁⲛⲉ ⲥⲁⲙⲟⲩⲏⲗ ϫⲉ
ϫⲉ ⲁⲓⲃⲱⲕ ⲁⲛⲃⲱⲕ ⲁⲃⲱⲕⲁⲛⲃⲱⲕ ⲉϩⲟⲩⲛ ⲉⲡⲙⲁⲉϩⲟⲛ ⲩⲡⲉⲙⲁ ⲙⲡⲛⲁ
ϭ ⲛⲣⲱⲙⲉ ⲁϥπαρακαλεῖνⲡⲁ̇ⲣⲁⲅⲁⲗⲓ ⲙ
ⲙⲟⲓ ϩⲁ ⲙⲁ ⲛⲁⲛⲑⲏⲛⲁⲥ
ⲓⲟⲥ ⲁⲓⲡⲱⲗϭ ⲛⲉⲙⲁϥ ⲙⲛⲧⲁⲓ ϩⲱⲃ ⲛⲙⲙⲁⲕⲙⲙ
ⲧⲓϩⲱⲃ ⲛⲛⲏⲙⲁⲕ ϩⲁ
vestiges
vestiges
ⲟⲩ ⲁⲣⲓ ⲧἀγάπηⲁⲅⲁⲡⲉ

ⲩ ⲛⲁⲛ ⲛⲅⲓⲁⲛⲅⲓⲁ
ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓϩⲛ ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ ⲧⲁⲁⲥ
ⲙⲡⲗⲁϣⲁⲛⲉⲗϣⲁⲛⲉ ⲥⲁⲙⲟⲩ
ⲏⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲛ ⲡⲁⲩⲗⲟⲥ ⲡϣⲏⲣⲉ
ⲛⲓⲱⲥⲏⲫ ⲡⲣⲙϫⲉⲙⲉ
